text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the students, summer is a time to hone mind and body ahead of
the fall racing season. But it's also a chance to recharge one's
batteries.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Among the activities set up for them is the Summer Walk, a series of
events centered around relaxation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With ample logistical and financial support from the academy,
students set out to enjoy their summers to the fullest.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: WOOOOO! It's barbecue time!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
We got the drinks? And desserts? Are the carrots all good to go?
We're gonna need some burgers to top it all off too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, almost forgot to take a picture! Hey, hey, Dober! Say cheese!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Aha... Taiki's all over the place.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (...But, yeah. She looks happy... I'm glad we came.)

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sob, sob... I haven't been home in forever... I'm so lonesome... Mom, Dad... Miss you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (...Okay. Today's the day I ask her!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
For this year's Summer Walk, would you like to go camping together? I thought
maybe if we made some fun memories together, you'd feel a bit less lonely.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(...But, I don't know... Can I really help when it's her family she wants
to see? Agh, now I'm doubting the idea.)

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Dober! Whatcha doin' here? Oh, is that a camping leaflet?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Maybe... it's for the Summer Walk?! Wow, I wanna try it! Let's go
together!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh... s-sure!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (Well, she invited me in the end, but that doesn't matter. For the next five days, I'll make sure she has a great time!)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, everything tastes better chargrilled! Piping hot carrots, so
yummy!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Mambo! Be careful while you play out there!

text_block_list.name: All
text_block_list.text:
Huh?!
Qué?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Haha! What a surprise! I wasn't expecting to meet you guys here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Me neither. Although, the academy is sponsoring this event, so it's
not that crazy if you think about it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Speaking of which, where are your usual friends?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I decided to go on my first solo camping trip! So I'm on my own. What
about you, El?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Me? Well... Grass was planning to come with me, but our schedules
clashed, so...

text_block_list.name: Mambo
text_block_list.text: KEE-AAH!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I didn't wanna miss it, so I came along with Mambo instead. There's a
lot more room for a condor to spread its wings here—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
AH! I-I mean! I don't have a pet condor! I've never seen that bird
before!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Mumu? Really?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I see... So she's been keeping a pet bird in secret and brought it here
so it could fly in the open.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (As her senior, I should probably give her a warning about that, but we are on the Summer Walk, after all. I'll turn a blind eye for now.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: So, anyway, um... I-if it's all right with you both, um...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Wow! El and Tannhauser! Fancy meetin' you here! Let's enjoy this
camping trip together!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Yay! Are you sure?! To be honest, solo camping was starting to
get a bit lonely...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Phew, that was close!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Sí! I got one, I got one! I've got a bite!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Good job! Now, um... El, just stay calm and reel it in. Gently, gently!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I think the bike rentals are over in that direction! Let's go, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Let's go, let's go! ♪ Oh, gotta grab my wallet!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Wooow! Look at all this open field! Let's flop, Dober! Flop!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Haha, guess I have no choice.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hehe! ♪ In just one day, I've already taken so many happy pictures!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You're going all out. Will the battery last the whole five days?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: No problem there! I brought a ton of spare batteries! I'll be fine!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...I was wondering, what is it you like about taking photos? You take
them back at the dorm too.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Hm... I like lookin' back over my pictures. When I'm on my own,
they bring back good memories!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (Of course. Taiki does get lonely easily...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Let's make lots of great memories here then! I'll, um... I'll do what I
can to make it fun!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
This is Ghillie Dhu's Garden. And that river over there is... Yes, no
doubt about it. This really is the place!
